name: Claude
description: 最強推理能力，支援 1M context，程式碼生成頂尖
descriptionEn: Best-in-class reasoning with 1M context, top-tier code generation
steps: 前往 console.anthropic.com 註冊帳號
進入 API Keys 頁面
點擊 Create Key
複製 API Key，設定環境變數 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
stepsEn: Go to console.anthropic.com and sign up
Navigate to the API Keys page
Click Create Key
Copy the API Key and set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable

name: GPT
description: 最廣泛使用的 LLM，生態系最完整，GPT-4o 多模態能力強
descriptionEn: Most widely adopted LLM with the richest ecosystem, GPT-4o excels at multimodal tasks
steps: 前往 platform.openai.com 註冊帳號
進入 API Keys 頁面
點擊 Create new secret key
複製 API Key，設定環境變數 OPENAI_API_KEY
stepsEn: Go to platform.openai.com and sign up
Navigate to API Keys page
Click Create new secret key
Copy the API Key and set OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable

name: Gemini
description: Google 旗艦模型，2M context window 業界最大，多模態原生支援
descriptionEn: Google's flagship model with industry-leading 2M context window, native multimodal support
steps: 前往 aistudio.google.com 登入 Google 帳號
點擊 Get API key
選擇或建立 Google Cloud 專案
複製 API Key，設定環境變數 GOOGLE_API_KEY
stepsEn: Go to aistudio.google.com and sign in with Google
Click Get API key
Select or create a Google Cloud project
Copy the API Key and set GOOGLE_API_KEY environment variable

name: DeepSeek
description: 中國開源模型黑馬，推理能力媲美頂尖模型，價格極低
descriptionEn: China's open-source dark horse, reasoning rivaling top models at a fraction of the cost
steps: 前往 platform.deepseek.com 註冊帳號
進入 API Keys 頁面
點擊 Create API Key
複製 API Key，設定環境變數 DEEPSEEK_API_KEY
stepsEn: Go to platform.deepseek.com and sign up
Navigate to API Keys page
Click Create API Key
Copy the API Key and set DEEPSEEK_API_KEY environment variable

name: Qwen
description: 阿里通義千問，中文理解最強，支援超長文本和多模態
descriptionEn: Alibaba's Qwen, best Chinese language understanding with long-text and multimodal support
steps: 前往 dashscope.console.aliyun.com 註冊阿里雲帳號
開通 DashScope 服務
進入 API Key 管理頁面，建立金鑰
複製 API Key，設定環境變數 DASHSCOPE_API_KEY
stepsEn: Go to dashscope.console.aliyun.com and create Alibaba Cloud account
Enable DashScope service
Go to API Key management and create a key
Copy the API Key and set DASHSCOPE_API_KEY environment variable

name: Grok
description: Elon Musk 的 xAI 打造，即時存取 X/Twitter 數據，回應風格直接
descriptionEn: Built by Elon Musk's xAI, real-time X/Twitter data access with a direct response style
steps: 前往 console.x.ai 註冊帳號
進入 API Keys 頁面
點擊 Create API Key
複製 API Key，設定環境變數 XAI_API_KEY
stepsEn: Go to console.x.ai and sign up
Navigate to API Keys page
Click Create API Key
Copy the API Key and set XAI_API_KEY environment variable

name: Llama
description: Meta 開源旗艦，社群生態最活躍，可本地部署完全掌控
descriptionEn: Meta's open-source flagship with the most active community, fully self-hostable
steps: 前往 llama.meta.com 下載模型權重
安裝 Ollama 或 vLLM 等推理框架
載入模型：ollama run llama3
或透過 Together AI / Groq 等雲端 API 使用
stepsEn: Go to llama.meta.com to download model weights
Install an inference framework like Ollama or vLLM
Load the model: ollama run llama3
Or use via cloud APIs like Together AI / Groq

name: Mistral
description: 歐洲 AI 領頭羊，模型精悍高效，Agent 和函數呼叫能力優秀
descriptionEn: Europe's AI leader, lean and efficient models with excellent agent and function calling capabilities
steps: 前往 console.mistral.ai 註冊帳號
進入 API Keys 頁面
點擊 Create new key
複製 API Key，設定環境變數 MISTRAL_API_KEY
stepsEn: Go to console.mistral.ai and sign up
Navigate to API Keys page
Click Create new key
Copy the API Key and set MISTRAL_API_KEY environment variable

name: GLM
description: 清華系 AI 團隊打造，中文學術和商業場景表現突出
descriptionEn: Built by Tsinghua-backed Zhipu AI, excels in Chinese academic and business scenarios
steps: 前往 open.bigmodel.cn 註冊帳號
進入控制台 API Keys 頁面
點擊建立 API Key
複製 API Key，設定環境變數 ZHIPU_API_KEY
stepsEn: Go to open.bigmodel.cn and sign up
Navigate to console API Keys page
Click Create API Key
Copy the API Key and set ZHIPU_API_KEY environment variable

name: MiniMax
description: 語音和多模態見長，TTS 和語音對話品質業界領先
descriptionEn: Specializes in voice and multimodal, with industry-leading TTS and voice conversation quality
steps: 前往 platform.minimaxi.com 註冊帳號
進入 API Key 管理頁面
建立新的 API Key
複製 API Key，設定環境變數 MINIMAX_API_KEY
stepsEn: Go to platform.minimaxi.com and sign up
Navigate to API Key management page
Create a new API Key
Copy the API Key and set MINIMAX_API_KEY environment variable

name: Command R+
description: 企業級 RAG 專家，128K context，內建搜尋和引用功能
descriptionEn: Enterprise-grade RAG specialist with 128K context, built-in search and citation
steps: 前往 dashboard.cohere.com 註冊帳號
進入 API Keys 頁面
點擊 Generate Trial Key（免費試用）或 Production Key
複製 API Key，設定環境變數 COHERE_API_KEY
stepsEn: Go to dashboard.cohere.com and sign up
Navigate to the API Keys page
Click Generate Trial Key (free trial) or Production Key
Copy the API Key and set COHERE_API_KEY environment variable

name: Yi-Lightning
description: 零一萬物旗艦模型，極速推理，中英文能力出色
descriptionEn: 01.AI's flagship model with blazing-fast inference, excellent Chinese-English bilingual capabilities
steps: 前往 platform.01.ai 註冊帳號
進入 API 管理頁面
建立新的 API Key
複製 API Key，設定環境變數 YI_API_KEY
stepsEn: Go to platform.01.ai and sign up
Navigate to API management page
Create a new API Key
Copy the API Key and set YI_API_KEY environment variable
